questions.question: Explain the time complexity of the Insertion Sort algorithm in Big O notation and provide a brief justification for your answer.
questions.hint: Understand the concept of Big O notation and how it relates to sorting algorithms

questions.question: Consider an array of 10 integers. Compare the time complexity of Insertion Sort with Bubble Sort for this specific case. Which one is more efficient?
questions.hint: Understand the basic implementation of both sorting algorithms and their respective time complexities

questions.question: Write a step-by-step algorithm for Insertion Sort for an array of 5 integers. Include the initial and final state of the array. Show the comparisons and exchanges made during the process.
questions.hint: Use a clear and concise format to present your answer
